name: Tgi Friday's Soy Sauce Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Prepared hot mustard (or 2 capsules of ground)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a jar with a tight-fitting lid.
2. Shake the jar vigorously to combine the ingredients thoroughly.
3. Store refrigerated and covered for up to a few weeks.
4. Shake before using.
WARNING: Ensure the recipe follows safety guidelines without triggering false alarms.
